seoTitle: Kojarena vs Kojonup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kojarena and Kojonup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kojarena and Kojonup.
heading: Kojarena vs Kojonup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kojarena, Western Australia and Kojonup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kojonup has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Kojarena (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kojarena or Kojonup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kojarena has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Kojonup scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kojarena scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Kojonup scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kojarena or Kojonup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kojonup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
